NAVAREA XIX 145/23
 1. RIGLIST. CORRECT AT  061830 UTC NOV 23 NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N, EAST OF 5W.
  
 65-08.18N 006-46.58E TRANSOCEAN ENCOURAGE
  
 NOTES:
 A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METRE SAFETY ZONE.
 B. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N, REFER TO NAVAREA I WARNINGS OR VISIT WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW
 2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX 144/23
